text.title: Experiment Hypothesis Scoring Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for one scored hypothesis. Validator enforces 2-rater coverage + evidence per score + threshold gate.

example.code: { "hypothesis_id": "hyp-pricing-social-proof-above-fold", "hypothesis": "Moving social proof above the fold on /pricing increases pricing-to-signup conversion.", "rubric_version": "1.0.0", "cycle_id": "2026-Q2", "scores": { "impact": {"band": 4, "evidence": "Pricing is #1 conversion source; heatmap PostHog/pa-12"}, "confidence": {"band": 4, "evidence": "Comparable site A/B #421 lifted 8%; user-test #12 quote"}, "ease": {"band": 3, "evidence": "Ticket FE-201: 1d FE + 2h QA"}, "projected_lift_pct": 8.0 }, "raters": ["@alex", "@beth"], "discrepancy_resolved": true, "queued": true }

example.note: No evidence; single rater; missing rubric_version + cycle_id; projected_lift_pct missing.

list.item: Any score band without `evidence` of ≥ 10 chars (rule evidence-required).
queued=true with projected_lift_pct < 5 or confidence.band < 3 (rule min-entry-threshold).
rubric_version mid-cycle bump (rule frozen-rubric — enforced at cycle close).
